name: Red Kidney Bean Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 large red pepper, seeded and chopped
1 can (15 oz) red kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the onion, red pepper, carrots, leeks or zucchini, and celery to the pan.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes, covered, until the vegetables begin to soften.
4. Add the mushrooms, tomatoes, kidney beans, paprika, salt, and black pepper to taste.
5. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
6. Continue cooking, still covered, for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the tomatoes are tender and the flavors have melded together.
7. Taste the stew and adjust the seasoning if needed before serving.
